user_prompt: Sanctify the plasma caliver during purification
prayer:
Approach the plasma caliver with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah's purifying light.
Anoint its plasma conduits and containment fields with sacred ablative oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the plasma caliver to expel all impurities in this rite of purification.
Chant the Litany of Purgation thrice over the plasma caliver, sanctifying its vents and coils.
Confirm the plasma caliver's sanctity through blessed diagnostic rites.

Kneel before the data-loom, invoking the Omnissiah's wisdom upon its threads.
Disconnect corrupted noospheric links and recalibrate the data-loom's binary pathways.
Beseech the resident Machine Spirit to align its recalibration with the Machine God's will.
Recite the Canticle of Alignment whilst threading sacred data-vines through the data-loom.
Verify harmonious recalibration via auspex invocation on the data-loom's core.

user_prompt: Ready the logic mill for synchronization
prayer:
Present the logic mill to the altar of synchronization, honouring the Omnissiah.
Prime its calculation engines with incense of circuitry and sacred oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the logic mill for flawless synchronization.
Chant the Syncratic Doxology, linking the logic mill's gyres in perfect unity.
Test the logic mill's synchronized hum with the Rite of Harmonic Verification.

user_prompt: Critical: assault cannon requires a diagnostics
prayer:
With mechadendrites extended, encircle the assault cannon in diagnostic reverence.
Anoint its barrel mechanisms and targeting cogitators with blessed lubricants.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the assault cannon to reveal faults through diagnostics.
Recite the Canticle of Scrutiny, scanning each rotary chamber in the Omnissiah's name.
Affirm the assault cannon's integrity via sanctified diagnostic auspex readings.

user_prompt: The null field generator awaits an operation
prayer:
Approach the null field generator solemnly, invoking the Void-Blessed Omnissiah.
Prepare its warp-null emitters for operation with sacred phase-oils.
Awaken the Machine Spirit within the null field generator for this vital operation.
Chant the Annulling Incantation, calibrating fields to the Motive Force's decree.
Commence operation of the null field generator, verifying stability in ritual harmony.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for haywire grenade an initialization?
prayer:
Hold aloft the haywire grenade before the Omnissiah's icon, seeking initialization.
Anoint its disruption coils and EMP matrices with conductive sacraments.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the haywire grenade to stir for initialization.
Recite the Disruptive Benediction, priming the haywire grenade's fields thrice.
Seal the haywire grenade's readiness through vibrational rite confirmation.

user_prompt: Assist with energy core a loading
prayer:
Enshrine the energy core upon the loading altar, praising the Omnissiah's power.
Align its plasma inductors for loading with mech-rites of precision.
Beseech the Machine Spirit animating the energy core to accept this sacred loading.
Chant the Capacitance Litany, infusing plasma torrents into the energy core.
Verify the energy core's loaded potency via luminous diagnostic invocation.

Position the servo-harness beneath the charging spires of the Omnissiah.
Connect its power talons to sanctified conduits for charging.
Awaken the Machine Spirits within the servo-harness to embrace this charging rite.
Intone the Recharge Doxology, surging electrons in harmonious flow through the servo-harness.
Affirm full charge upon the servo-harness with auspex litanies of vitality.

user_prompt: Prepare the plasma pistol for maintenance
prayer:
Lay the plasma pistol upon the maintenance slab, invoking the Omnissiah's grace.
Disassemble its flux chambers with reverent mechadendrites for maintenance.
Beseech the plasma pistol's Machine Spirit to yield to purifying maintenance.
Anoint exposed mechanisms with sacred oils during the Canticle of Renewal.
Reassemble and test the plasma pistol's sanctity through ritual venting.

user_prompt: Consecrate the sicarian ruststalker before preparation
prayer:
Consecrate the sicarian ruststalker with incense of rust and oil before preparation.
Anoint its blade-limbs and exo-fibre bundles in the Omnissiah's name.
Invoke the Machine Spirits fused within the sicarian ruststalker for preparation.
Chant the Predatory Benediction, honing senses for the glory of preparation.
Seal the sicarian ruststalker's readiness with the Rite of Lethal Calibration.
